title: Nebraska Unit of Disability Examiners — Constitution
description: Governing constitution of the Nebraska Unit of Disability Examiners, a member chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) under the Great Plains Region. Covers name, NADE relationship, definitions, purpose, membership, the Executive Committee (President, Vice President, Secretary, Treasurer, Membership Chairperson), duties of officers, committees, meetings and quorum/proxy rules, amendments, and parliamentary authority. Amended and approved at Lincoln, Nebraska on March 29, 1988.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Nebraska Chapter (Nebraska Unit of Disability Examiners)
source.title: Constitution of the Nebraska Unit of Disability Examiners

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source file 'Nebraska-Const-Bylaws.doc' (in the same directory); markdown formatting was machine-derived (continuous list numbering across officer sections is a conversion artifact). Document closes 'Amended and approved at Lincoln, Nebraska on March 29, 1988', captured as temporal_coverage. The file is the chapter Constitution; bylaws are referenced (Great Plains Region) but not separately reproduced. NADE url is the organization site, not a deep link to this document.
